original: A new study suggests that contrary to most surveys, people are actually more stressed at home than at work.
translation_literal: 一项新的研究表明，与大多数调查相反，人们实际上在家比在工作时压力更大。

chunks.english: that contrary to most surveys, people are actually more stressed at home than at work
chunks.chinese: 与大多数调查相反，人们实际上在家比在工作时压力更大
chunks.relation: 作 suggests 的宾语
补充说明该研究结论与多数调查相反
宾语从句「that contrary to most surveys, people are actually more stressed at home than at work」内部主语
宾语从句「that contrary to most surveys, people are actually more stressed at home than at work」内部谓语

chunks.english: more stressed at home than at work
chunks.chinese: 在家比在工作时压力更大
chunks.relation: 作 are 的表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: contrary to most surveys 插在宾语从句前部，阅读时可先抓住 people are more stressed... 的主干。

original: Researchers measured people’s cortisol, which is a stress marker, while they were at work and while they were at home and found it higher at what is supposed to be a place of refuge.
translation_literal: 研究人员测量了人们的皮质醇，这是一种压力标志物，当他们在工作时以及当他们在家时，并发现它在本应是避难所的地方更高。

chunks.relation: 作 measured 的宾语
补充说明 cortisol

chunks.english: while they were at work and while they were at home
chunks.chinese: 当他们在工作时以及当他们在家时
chunks.relation: 说明测量发生的两个场景
与 measured 并列

chunks.english: it higher at what is supposed to be a place of refuge
chunks.chinese: 它在本应是避难所的地方更高
chunks.relation: 补充说明 found 的宾语状态

chunks.english: what is supposed to be a place of refuge
chunks.relation: 作介词 at 的宾语
which 定语从句内部主语，指 cortisol
which 定语从句内部谓语
which 定语从句内部表语
while 状语从句内部主语
while 状语从句内部谓语
说明「while they were at work and while they were at home」的时间、原因、条件或方式
说明「while they were at work and while they were at home」的时间、原因、条件或方式
what 宾语从句内部主语
what 宾语从句内部谓语
what 宾语从句内部表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: while A and while B; measured... and found...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 本句同时有两个 while 状语和两个并列谓语，阅读时先抓 Researchers measured... and found...。

original: “Further contradicting conventional wisdom, we found that women as well as men have lower levels of stress at work than at home”, writes one of the researchers, Sarah Damske.
translation_literal: “进一步与传统看法相矛盾的是，我们发现女性和男性一样，在工作中的压力水平低于在家中的压力水平，”研究人员之一萨拉·达姆斯克写道。

chunks.chinese: 进一步与传统看法相矛盾的是

chunks.english: that women as well as men have lower levels of stress at work than at home
chunks.chinese: 女性和男性一样，在工作中的压力水平低于在家中的压力水平
chunks.relation: 作 found 的宾语

chunks.english: writes one of the researchers, Sarah Damske
chunks.chinese: 研究人员之一萨拉·达姆斯克写道
chunks.relation: 说明引语来源
解释 one of the researchers
宾语从句内部主语
宾语从句内部谓语

chunks.english: lower levels of stress at work than at home
chunks.chinese: 工作时比在家时更低的压力水平
chunks.relation: 宾语从句内部宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: writes one of the researchers, Sarah Damske 放在引语后，说明前面观点来源。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 名词短语 + 专有名词
sentence_patterns.explanation: Sarah Damske 是 one of the researchers 的同位语。

original: In fact women even say they feel better at work, she notes.
translation_literal: 事实上，女性甚至说她们在工作时感觉更好，她指出。

chunks.chinese: 她们在工作时感觉更好
chunks.relation: 作 say 的宾语
说明观点来源

sentence_patterns.explanation: she notes 位于句末，说明前面内容的来源。

original: “It is men, not women, who report being happier at home than at work.”
translation_literal: “是男性，而不是女性，报告说他们在家比在工作时更快乐。”

chunks.english: It is men, not women, who

chunks.relation: 被强调的主语

chunks.english: being happier at home than at work
chunks.chinese: 在家比在工作时更快乐
chunks.relation: 作 report 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is/was + 被强调部分 + who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: 本句强调 men, not women，说明报告在家更快乐的是男性而不是女性。

original: Another surprise is that findings hold true for both those with children and without, but more so for nonparents.
translation_literal: 另一个令人惊讶之处是，研究结果对有孩子和没有孩子的人都适用，但对没有孩子的人更是如此。

chunks.english: that findings hold true for both those with children and without
chunks.chinese: 研究结果对有孩子和没有孩子的人都适用
chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

chunks.chinese: 但对没有孩子的人更是如此
chunks.relation: 省略 hold true
表语从句内部主语
表语从句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: but more so for nonparents 省略了 findings hold true，表示“对无子女者更适用”。

original: This is why people who work outside the home have better health.
translation_literal: 这就是为什么在外工作的人健康状况更好。

chunks.english: why people who work outside the home have better health
chunks.chinese: 为什么在外工作的人健康状况更好
chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语
修饰 people

chunks.english: people who work outside the home
chunks.relation: why 表语从句内部主语
why 表语从句内部谓语
作 have 的宾语

original: What the study doesn’t measure is whether people are still doing work when they’re at home, whether it is household work or work brought home from the office.
translation_literal: 这项研究没有测量的是，人们在家时是否仍在工作，不管这是家务劳动还是从办公室带回家的工作。

chunks.chinese: 这项研究没有测量的内容

chunks.english: whether people are still doing work when they’re at home
chunks.chinese: 人们在家时是否仍在工作
chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

chunks.english: whether it is household work or work brought home from the office
chunks.chinese: 不管这是家务劳动还是从办公室带回家的工作
chunks.relation: 补充说明 work 的类型
修饰 work
表语从句「whether people are still doing work when they’re at home」内部主语
表语从句「whether people are still doing work when they’re at home」内部谓语
表语从句「whether people are still doing work when they’re at home」内部宾语，作用于「whether people are still doing work when they’re at home」
让步/选择结构「whether it is household work or work brought home from the office」中的并列部分

chunks.english: work brought home from the office
chunks.chinese: 从办公室带回家的工作
chunks.relation: 让步/选择结构「whether it is household work or work brought home from the office」中的并列部分

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: whether A, whether B or C
sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个 whether 结构连续出现，先抓 What...is whether people are still doing work 这个主干。

original: For many men, the end of the workday is a time to kick back.
translation_literal: 对于许多男性来说，工作日的结束是一个放松的时间。

chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

original: For women who stay home, they never get to leave the office.
translation_literal: 对于待在家里的女性来说，她们从来不能离开办公室。

chunks.chinese: 对于待在家里的女性来说

chunks.relation: 修饰 women
作 leave 的宾语

original: And for women who work outside the home, they often are playing catch-up-with-household tasks.
translation_literal: 而对于在外工作的女性来说，她们常常在赶做家务任务。

chunks.english: for women who work outside the home
chunks.chinese: 对于在外工作的女性来说

chunks.relation: 作 playing 的宾语

original: With the blurring of roles, and the fact that the home front lags well behind the workplace in making adjustments for working women, it’s not surprising that women are more stressed at home.
translation_literal: 由于角色的模糊，以及家庭方面在为职业女性作出调整上远远落后于工作场所这一事实，女性在家压力更大并不令人惊讶。

chunks.english: With the blurring of roles, and the fact that the home front lags well behind the workplace in making adjustments for working women
chunks.chinese: 由于角色的模糊以及家庭方面在为职业女性作出调整上远远落后于工作场所这一事实

chunks.english: that the home front lags well behind the workplace in making adjustments for working women
chunks.chinese: 家庭方面在为职业女性作出调整上远远落后于工作场所
chunks.relation: 解释 the fact 的内容
作 is 的表语

chunks.english: that women are more stressed at home
chunks.relation: 真正主语，对应形式主语 it
状语「With the blurring of roles, and the fact that the home front lags well behind the workplace in making adjustments for working women」中的并列部分

chunks.english: the fact that the home front lags well behind the workplace
chunks.chinese: 家庭方面远远落后于工作场所这一事实
chunks.relation: 状语「With the blurring of roles, and the fact that the home front lags well behind the workplace in making adjustments for working women」中的并列部分

真正主语从句内部谓语
真正主语从句内部表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 that women are more stressed at home。
that the home front lags... 解释 the fact 的具体内容。

original: But it’s not just a gender thing.
translation_literal: 但这不只是一个性别问题。

chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

original: At work, people pretty much know what they’re supposed to be doing: working, making money, doing the tasks they have to do in order to draw an income.
translation_literal: 在工作中，人们基本上知道他们应该做什么：工作、赚钱、完成他们为了获得收入而必须做的任务。

chunks.english: what they’re supposed to be doing
chunks.relation: 作 know 的宾语

chunks.english: working, making money, doing the tasks they have to do in order to draw an income
chunks.chinese: 工作、赚钱、完成他们为了获得收入而必须做的任务

修饰 tasks

chunks.english: in order to draw an income
chunks.relation: 说明做任务的目的
宾语从句「what they’re supposed to be doing」内部主语
宾语从句「what they’re supposed to be doing」内部谓语
同位语解释结构「working, making money, doing the tasks they have to do in order to draw an income」中的并列部分
同位语解释结构「working, making money, doing the tasks they have to do in order to draw an income」中的并列部分

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后的 working, making money, doing... 具体解释 what they’re supposed to be doing。
working, making money, doing the tasks 是并列的具体工作内容。

original: The bargain is very pure: Employee puts in hours of physical or mental labor and employee draws out life-sustaining moola.
translation_literal: 这个交易非常纯粹：雇员投入数小时的体力或脑力劳动，然后雇员获得维持生活的钱。

chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

chunks.english: Employee puts in hours of physical or mental labor and employee draws out life-sustaining moola
chunks.chinese: 雇员投入数小时的体力或脑力劳动并获得维持生活的钱

说明雇员和工作之间的交换

sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后的句子解释 The bargain 的具体内容。

original: On the home front, however, people have no such clarity.
translation_literal: 然而，在家庭方面，人们没有这样的清晰性。

chunks.relation: 作 have 的宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: however 插入句中，提示与工作场景形成转折。

original: Rare is the household in which the division of labor is so clinically and methodically laid out.
translation_literal: 家庭中劳动分工如此临床般精确且有条理地安排好的情况是很少见的。

chunks.chinese: 这样的家庭是很少见的

chunks.english: in which the division of labor is so clinically and methodically laid out

定语从句「in which the division of labor is so clinically and methodically laid out」内部谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: Rare 位于句首引起倒装，正常语序是 The household... is rare。

original: There are a lot of tasks to be done, there are inadequate rewards for most of them.
translation_literal: 有很多任务要完成，而其中大多数任务没有足够的回报。

chunks.english: There are a lot of tasks to be done

chunks.relation: 修饰 tasks

chunks.english: there are inadequate rewards for most of them
chunks.chinese: 其中大多数任务没有足够的回报
chunks.relation: 与前一分句并列
there be 分句中的真实主语
there be 分句中的谓语
第二 there be 分句中的真实主语
第二 there be 分句中的谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个 there be 分句并列，分别说明家务任务多和回报不足。

original: Your home colleagues—your family—have no clear rewards for their labor; they need to be talked into it, or if they’re teenagers, threatened with complete removal of all electronic devices.
translation_literal: 你的家庭同事，也就是你的家人，对他们的劳动没有明确的回报；他们需要被说服去做，或者如果他们是青少年，就要用完全没收所有电子设备来威胁。

chunks.relation: 解释 Your home colleagues

chunks.english: no clear rewards for their labor
chunks.chinese: 对他们劳动没有明确回报
chunks.relation: 作 have 的宾语

chunks.english: they need to be talked into it
chunks.relation: 分号后补充说明家人需要被动员

chunks.english: or if they’re teenagers, threatened with complete removal of all electronic devices
chunks.chinese: 或者如果他们是青少年，就要用完全没收所有电子设备来威胁
chunks.relation: 省略 they need to be

sentence_patterns.explanation: your family 是 Your home colleagues 的同位语。
threatened 前省略 they need to be，需补出才能理解完整。

original: Plus, they’re your family.
translation_literal: 此外，他们是你的家人。

chunks.relation: 作 are 的表语

original: You cannot fire your family.
translation_literal: 你不能解雇你的家人。

chunks.relation: 作 fire 的宾语

original: You never really get to go home from home.
translation_literal: 你从来不能真正从家里回到家。

chunks.relation: 说明动作方向

key_phrases.meaning: 从家里回家，表示家庭压力无法摆脱

original: So it’s not surprising that people are more stressed at home.
translation_literal: 所以人们在家压力更大并不令人惊讶。

chunks.relation: 作 is 的表语

chunks.english: that people are more stressed at home
chunks.relation: 真正主语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + adj. + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 that people are more stressed at home。

original: Not only are the tasks apparently infinite, the co-workers are much harder to motivate.
translation_literal: 不仅任务显然是无穷无尽的，同事们也更难被激励。

chunks.english: Not only are the tasks apparently infinite
chunks.chinese: 不仅任务显然是无穷无尽的

chunks.relation: 倒装分句中的主语
倒装分句中的谓语，提前到主语前

第二并列分句的表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: Not only + 助动词/be + 主语 + 其他
sentence_patterns.explanation: Not only 位于句首引起部分倒装，正常语序是 the tasks are apparently infinite。
